texto: Understand is not the word; you are right, you can never really 'understand' about someone, anyone, even yourself. It is best to believe in them as human; feel that they are alive like you and need warmth, concern.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rudy Wiebe: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Understand is not the word; you are right, you can never really 'understand' about someone, anyon…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, literature, wiebe pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de wiebe.
